title: Rootbound Vault Visual Prep
style: immersive fantasy realism, coherent tabletop campaign reference art, grounded materials, clear silhouettes, no unwanted film grain, no readable text

subjects.label: Tamsin Reed Reference Sheet
subjects.anchor: small halfling delver in practical dark travel gear, chalk pouch, careful posture
subjects.sheet: front view, back view, three-quarter view, cautious crouch
subjects.action: marking a safe moss path with chalk
subjects.avoid: do not make her human-sized or elf-like

subjects.label: Bramble Sentinel Reference Sheet
subjects.anchor: humanoid guardian made of braided roots and thorns, green ember eyes, cracked pale stone mask, wet root armor silhouette
subjects.sheet: front view, side view, silhouette, reaching attack pose
subjects.action: pushing through roots without revealing any game stats

subjects.label: Living Root Door Location Plate
subjects.anchor: breathing root-lattice vault door in wet black stone, shallow water channel, moss path, tiny green fire in cracks
subjects.sheet: wide establishing view and close detail panel
subjects.action: door slightly opening when the room falls silent

subjects.label: Green Fire Seed Prop Sheet
subjects.anchor: small seed of green fire nested inside a living root hollow, bright but not burning the wet bark
subjects.sheet: macro close-up, hand-scale reference, root cradle detail
